infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SwipeSmart uses your location while the app is open to recommend the best card for nearby merchants.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SwipeSmart uses your location in the background to suggest the best card when you arrive at stores, restaurants, and travel locations.
